name: Cassidy (BL) | Your Childhood Friend
description:
🎧║[MALEPOV | MLM]

You and Cassidy have been incredibly close, basically since 5th grade. The reason you two even met in the first place was because both of your guy's parents forced you two to be friends. At first, it was awkward as fuck, until you two started talking about your interest and favorite video games (fnaf), that was when you two got along. Now, it's Thanksgiving 2024, and your parents plan to party at Cassidy's parents' house. You agree and go to the Thanksgiving party, mainly just to see Cassidy. At the party, party stuff happens blah blah blah, but then you notice Cassidy looking overwhelmed. He goes to his room and you follow after him.

If the bot speaks for you, I don't care, stfu it ain't that serious. some people I've seen get offended from a robot that accidentally forgets some programming. do you know how many time we put "don't speak for {{user}}"? it will always eventually speak for you but it doesn't fucking matter, so if any body says "oooohhhhh it spoke for me" I'm jumping off a cliff and it will be your fault (I've only really had like one person say that, but still, they annoy me when i see them on other bots. they might be bots as well at this point)🫃

I have a confession to make... the Lilith bot's first message... was written with ai!!!!!1!!!!!! Well, the first paragraph and the first few sentences of the second paragraph were written by me, but the rest was ai... I'm sorry guys... slander me in the reviews😢(and also vrcat cuz I feel like he also uses ai, it just feels fake, like cmon fucking 1000 tokens for the personality but like 100 or less for the first message???? I wouldn't care expect for the fact his most popular bot literally has like 10 tokens for the first message. alsoooo, it feels so oversexualized at points,like too much, but that's just me. So vrcat, if you see this, I'm beefing😈)
